commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Blacksmith Testbox `--id tbx_...` key-existence guard to `scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs` and covers missing-key, existing-key, and slug-reuse behavior in wrapper tests.

PR surface: Tests +83, Other +51. Total +134 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main lets `run --provider blacksmith-testbox --id tbx_*` proceed without checking for the expected Crabbox key, while Crabbox later uses `<user-config>/crabbox/testboxes/<id>/id_ed25519`. I did not run the live Blacksmith path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this is a draft maintainer-labeled PR whose remaining action is owner review and validation before marking ready.

target.title: fix(scripts): guard reused testbox keys
target.body:
Summary:
- fail fast when `crabbox-wrapper` is asked to reuse a Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_...` id that has no Crabbox-owned SSH key
- keep Crabbox slug reuse delegated to Crabbox so `--id <slug>` still works
- cover missing-key, existing-key, and slug reuse behavior in the wrapper tests

Verification:
- `node --check scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs`
- `node --check test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts`
- `oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --id tbx_fake_direct -- echo ok` exits 2 with the new actionable message
- `codex review --base origin/main` clean after rebase

Known proof gap:
- Broad `check:changed` could not complete because Blacksmith Testbox remained queued during live proof. A Crabbox-owned warmup did create a reusable Testbox id and got past the new key guard, but the run did not leave the Blacksmith queue; the created Testbox was stopped and `blacksmith testbox list` showed no active boxes afterward.
target.author: vincentkoc
